creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 245376
update snapshot and unbreak i386

With hint from upstream I think we have a work-around:

https://pkg.skunkwerks.at/poudriere/data/13_2_x32-default/2023-10-02_12h03m06s/logs/h2o-devel-2.3.0.d.20230928.log

Can you test the patch and let me know if it works?
